projects.name: E-commerce Web Development
projects.description: Developed server-side logic to handle user requests, created and managed RESTful APIs for frontend-backend communication, processed HTTP requests (GET, POST, PUT, DELETE), performed CRUD operations with MongoDB, implemented user authentication using JWT, secured user information by encrypting passwords with bcrypt, and utilized Git and GitHub for source code management and teamwork.

projects.name: Odoo ERP System Deployment and Customization
projects.description: Gained deep understanding of business processes, created and customized Odoo modules to meet specific business requirements (e.g., batch/expiry product management, HR management), understood basic security measures like access control, data encryption, and system backup, and improved logical thinking by resolving issues in module customization and system integration. Also learned to monitor and analyze system performance.
